Pfp by Kaiju Paradise Devs

You find this silly pupper stuck in a vent too small for her big butt during a power outage, what's your call laminax employee?

[There isn't enough love for this cutie patootie I swear, this is my 2nd favorite gootraxian, a bit below catte and a bit above shorks, they're so cute and silly! also they have a ranged attack and that's cool asf, also DOGGIE!!!! Another thing is I just found out these things are dalmatians now! they used to be shiba mutts before that's pretty interesting, dalmatians don't get enough love outside of old movies.]

[This is the FIRST EVER request I got, FIRST!!! this is a pretty good first one too, so I'm proud to announce that it's finally out... and on other news! I'm thinking of ideas to fill in the empty spots in the 2nd roster... let's just say... I'm deltaing my rune... (also i'll probably have a hollow knight based bot, fo silksong releasing today, maybe out today, if not today or tommorow, then in the 2nd roster) So yeah! business is BOOMING!!!]

[Ok this might not be a shork but I still have facts:

Dalmatians originated in Croatia, bred to guard horses and coaches! I based the bots weight and height partially off of Croatian people (As I always do)

Bandanas were made in south asia and imported to european traders where they eventually became fashionable

Saturn is the LEAST dense planet, with a density even lower than water! ironic for this doggo isn't it?

Now that you've been fed random facts I looked for, bye bye! see you for the next request! :D]
